case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER VS. DIANA ABUZAHRIEH ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ABUZAHRIEH, DIANA AN INDIVIDUAL GOLDEN STATE PIZZA AND GRILL INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABUZAHRIEH, DIANA AN INDIVIDUAL GOLDEN STATE PIZZA AND GRILL INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $650.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $650.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
